english_query: And now, having made this change, let us talk to those who say that all is moving, and ask them if all things have the two kinds of moving, and are changed as well as move in place, or is one thing moved in both ways, and another in one only?
ugf_response: I do not know what to answer; but I think they would say that all things are moved in both ways.

english_query: I believe that you are.
ugf_response: Then begin again, and answer me, what, by you and your friend the well known teacher of speaking, is the way to say what being good is?

english_query: It looks like not all things are under the care of god. For nothing that is seen before can happen by chance. If god saw all things before, nothing would happen by chance. And so chance would go away; which goes against what most people think.
ugf_response: There is a big change between a cause for one thing and a cause for all. A thing can get away from the plan of a cause for one thing; but not from the plan of a cause for all. For nothing gets away from the plan of a cause for one thing, except when another cause for one thing stops it; like water stopping wood from burning. Since all causes for one thing are under the cause for all, it could not be that any end happens outside the reach of that cause for all. So when an end gets away from the plan of a cause for one thing, we say it is by chance for that cause; but if we look at the cause for all, outside whose reach no end can happen, we say it was seen before. So, for one case, two workers meeting, although to them it looks like a chance thing, was seen before by their leader, who sent them to meet at the same place, in such a way that one did not know about the other.

english_query: Well, then, can you name one person from long ago who made the people in the city better, finding them worse and making them good, from the day he started speaking? For I do not know such a man.
ugf_response: What! Did you never hear that the great leader of long ago was a good man, and the other strong leaders and the one who just died, whom you heard yourself?

english_query: You think right. And now, my friend, please to start again at this point; and having wiped out of your mind all that has come before, see if you have found a clearer view, and once more say what is what someone knows.
ugf_response: I cannot say, old teacher, that all thinking is what someone knows, because there may be a wrong thinking; but I will try to say, that what someone knows is right thinking: let this then be my answer; and if this is later shown to be wrong, I must try to find another.

english_query: I will have the same thing done to me, I know, if I go to the place where people say who is right. I cannot tell the crowd about the good times I got for them. They think these are good things, even though I do not hate those who get them or those who have them. If someone says I make young people bad and turn their heads around, or that I say bad things about old people in a mean way, it does no good to say: I do this for what is right, and for your good, my people who say who is right, and for nothing else. So we do not know what will happen to me.
ugf_response: Do you think, old teacher, that a man who cannot stand up for himself is in a good spot?

english_query: Also, seeing something better can happen in two ways: because of the thing seen, or because of the power of the one who sees. On the side of the thing, it happens because the thing is taken in better, that is, by a better picture; but this does not fit here, for God is there for the mind seeing Him not by a picture, but by His true being. So if one sees Him better than another, it must be because of the change in mind power; so the one with more mind power will see Him clearer; and this is wrong; since being like the good spirits is promised to men as their great good.
ugf_response: The change in seeing will not come from the thing seen, for the same thing will be shown to all--that is, the true being of God; nor will it come from different ways of taking in the thing by different pictures; but it will come from the different power of the mind, not the normal power, but the power made great.

english_query: Also, nothing comes from itself. But the lower way of thinking comes from the higher way, and is led by it. So the higher way of thinking is a different power from the lower way.
ugf_response: We say the lower way of thinking comes from the higher, or is led by it, because the first steps used by the lower way are taken from and led by the first steps of the higher way.

english_query: And must they not think that those who are hurt are sad in the same way as the hurt that is done to them?
ugf_response: How can it be any other way?

english_query: It seems that the part of the great one who speaks out is not different from the great one. For just as the wish of the great one is the cause of things, so is the knowing of the great one. But we do not say that the knowing of the great one speaks out. So we should not say that the wish of the great one speaks out.
ugf_response: What is known is not the cause of a thing being done, unless through wishing. For we do not do what we know, unless we wish to do so. So speaking out is not said of what is known, but of wishing.

english_query: I answer, old teacher, that the art of making people believe is about talking in places where laws are made and other groups, as I was just saying, and about what is right and wrong.
ugf_response: And that, well known teacher of speaking, was what I thought you meant; yet I would not have you be surprised if later I am found asking a question that seems easy; for I ask not to show you are wrong, but as I was saying that the talk may go on one step after another, and that we may not get used to guessing and thinking we know what the other person means; I would have you show your own ideas in your own way, no matter what your starting point is.

english_query: Also, those who have this kind of love are pushed by outside forces more than they push themselves; because no one can change their own deep way of being. But the spirits from god are not pushed by others, they choose to act because they can pick their own path. So there is no such love in them.
ugf_response: Everything in the world is pushed to do things by something else, except the First Mover, who is never pushed by another; in him, what he is and what he wants are the same. So it is not wrong for a spirit from god to be pushed to act, if this push was put in him by the one who made his deep way of being. Yet he is not pushed so much that he does not act on his own, because he can choose.

english_query: Also, if you say god rested on the day after the six days of making by having man rest, this is wrong. Rest is not work. We cannot say 'god made' means 'god made man make'. So god resting cannot mean he made man rest.
ugf_response: Just as god rests in himself and is good in himself, our only good is in god. So he makes us rest in him, from his work and our work. It is not wrong to say god rested by giving us rest. But this is not the only way to see it, and the other way is the main one.

english_query: Also, the soul, which is the air of living, is in all of the body, and most in the heart. So it was not right to say: 'He blew into his face the air of living.'
ugf_response: Since the acts of life are more clearly seen in the face of a human, because of the senses that show there; so the books about god say that the air of living was blown into the face of a human.

english_query: A thing is what it is by itself
ugf_response: But the same thing look big when it is next to a small thing and look small when it is next to a big thing. The way it look also can change for different people who see it. Because the look of a thing is set to what is next to it or who see it we can not say what it real is alone. We do not say either yes or no

english_query: Yes old teacher; I agree there; for doing right is being good.
ugf_response: Would you say 'being good,' young man, or 'a way of being good'?

english_query: Also, if we could show why god is there, we could only do it by looking at what he made. But what he made is not the same size as him, since he is without end and what he made has an end; and there is no way to fit what has an end with what does not. So, since we cannot show a maker by looking at what he made if they are not the same size, it seems we cannot show that god is there.
ugf_response: We cannot get full knowing of the maker by looking at what he made if they are not the same size. But from every thing made we can clearly show that the maker is there, and so we can show that god is there by looking at what he made; though by them we cannot know god as he really is.

english_query: Also, the thing where we know all other things, and by which we say if other things are right, is known to us in itself. But even now we know all things in god; for the great old church teacher says: 'If we both see that what you say is true, and we both see that what I say is true; where, I ask, do we see this? not I in you, nor you in me; but both of us in the very truth itself that does not change and is above our minds.' He also says that 'We say if all things are right by the god truth'; and that 'it is the job of thinking to say if these body things are right by the no-body and forever ideas; which unless they were above the mind could not be not changing.' So even in this life we see god himself.
ugf_response: All things are said to be seen in god and all things are said to be right in him, because by sharing in his light, we know and say if all things are right; for the light of our own thinking itself is a share of the god light; just as we are said to see and say if things we can feel are right in the sun, that is, by the light of the sun. So the great old church teacher says, 'The things we learn can only be seen as it were by their own sun,' which is god. So as in order to see a thing we can feel, it is not needed to see what the sun really is, so in the same way to see any thing we can think, it is not needed to see what god really is.

english_query: Also, words for body things are used for god only as a picture; since he has no body. But all such words point to some body state; for their meaning is tied to time and parts and like body states. So all these words are used for god only as a picture.
ugf_response: These words used for god in a real way point to body states not in what is meant, but in how we mean it; while those used for god as a picture point to and mean a body state in what is meant.

english_query: Yes my friend, if he ended the life of another in a wrong way, in which case he is also to be sorry for; and he is not to be wanted by others if he ended his life in a right way.
ugf_response: For sure you will let it be true that he who is ended in life in a wrong way is sad, and to be sorry for?

english_query: Also, what is and what can be are not different in things that last forever, and even less so in God. But it is possible for the good spirit to be different from the Son, even if He did not come from Him. For a good old teacher says: 'The Son and the good spirit get their being from the Father; but each in a different way; one by being born, the other by going out, so they are different from each other.' And he says later: 'For even if there were no other reason for the Son and the good spirit to be different, this alone would be enough.' So the good spirit is different from the Son, without coming from Him.
ugf_response: The good spirit is different from the Son because where one comes from is different from where the other comes from; but this being different in where they come from is because the Son is only from the Father, while the good spirit is from the Father and the Son; for if this were not so, the ways they come would not be different from each other, as was said before.

english_query: In the same big way, we might also have right thoughts about a thing with wheels; but the one who can say what it really is by counting the hundred boards adds a clear reason to right thoughts, and instead of just thoughts has a way of doing things and knowing of the way things are of a thing with wheels, because he gets the whole thing through the small parts.
ugf_response: And do you not agree with that way of seeing things, old teacher?

english_query: Really old teacher, I say that I did not mean that. I only asked the question because I do it often; but if you can show me that what you say is true, I want you to.
ugf_response: It will not be easy, but I will try to make you happy as much as I can. Let us say that you call one of your many helpers, so I can show this to him.

english_query: It seems that the name of picture is not right for the Son. Because an old teacher from a far place says the spirit is the picture of the Son. So the name picture does not belong to the Son alone.
ugf_response: The old teacher from a far place and other teachers from the east use the word picture to mean a thing that looks just like another.

english_query: Still old number man, I am afraid that I will not be able to do what the young person asks.
ugf_response: Not do it! for what reason?

english_query: Also the old teacher who thought much says that if a thing is just a shape without stuff, it is and is one by itself, and has no reason for being and being one. But the bright spirits are shapes without stuff, as was shown before. So they have no reason for being.
ugf_response: Things that are just standing shapes have no reason for their shape or their being one, nor a reason that works by changing stuff from not being to being; but they have a reason that makes their whole being. From this the answer to the third problem is clear.

english_query: But now what can we call him-what is the thing he is good at.
ugf_response: Oh close friend, there are many things persons are good at which come from trying, and they start from what persons have seen, because seeing things makes persons' days go by what they are good at, and not seeing things makes them go by chance, and different persons are good at different things, and the best persons are good at the best things. And our friend the well known teacher of speaking is one of the best, and the thing in which he is good is the most good.

english_query: And to which kind would the bright young one talk about what it is, for this, of all our idea, is the most all?
ugf_response: I should say to that kind that thought want to know about it.

english_query: It looks like the human soul, when not with the body, can move bodies to a new place. Because a body follows a spirit thing when it comes to moving to a new place, as was said before. But the soul not with the body is a spirit thing. So it can move outside bodies by its order.
ugf_response: There are some spirit things whose power is not fixed to certain bodies; such are the good spirit helpers who are by what they are free from a body; so many bodies may follow them in moving. But if the power to move of a spirit thing is by what it is fixed to move one certain body, that thing will not be able to move a body of a higher kind, but only one of a lower kind: so the movers of the lower sky cannot move the higher sky. So, since the soul is by what it is fixed to move the body of which it is the shape, it cannot by its power move any other body.

english_query: That is what is needed, the well known teacher of speaking; show the short way now, and the long way at some other time.
ugf_response: Well, I will; and you will certainly say, that you never heard a man use less words.

english_query: No, not in this way of saying it, old teacher.
ugf_response: Then I spoke the truth, hot one, that not you, nor I, nor any person, would want to do wrong more than to have wrong done to them; for doing wrong is the bigger bad thing of the two.

english_query: And what from bad things and wrong acts? If you cannot answer right now, ask yourself where we go with the sick, and to whom we take them.
ugf_response: To the people who help the sick, old teacher.

english_query: Also, there is nothing made of parts in god. But care for things looks like it is made of parts, because it has both thinking and wanting in it. So care for things is not in god.
ugf_response: Care for things lives in the mind; but it needs the act of wanting the end thing. No one gives orders about things done for an end thing; unless he wants that end thing. So being able to think well needs being good, which leads the part that wants toward good, as the teacher who knows much says. Even if care for things has to do with the wanting of god and the thinking of god the same way, this would not change how simple god is, since in god both wanting and thinking are the very same thing, as we have said before.

english_query: Then they must be seen as different?
ugf_response: I think that they must.

english_query: Of course he is, old teacher.
ugf_response: And is he a person who looks at the stars, a person who counts, a person who plays music, and for the most part a person who has learned a lot?

english_query: If you went into the place where people fight in the south, old number man, would you be right to look at the fighters with no clothes, some of them looking bad, if you did not take off your clothes and let them see your own body?
ugf_response: Why not, old teacher, if they let me, as I think you will, because of my age and how hard it is for me to move; let some young person who can move easy try to fall with you, and do not pull me into the place for moving.

english_query: How there can be wrong ideas--that hard part still bothers the eye of my mind; and I am not sure if I should stop asking the question, or start again in a new way.
ugf_response: Start again, the old teacher,--at least if you think that there is any need for doing so. Did not you and the friend just now say very well, that in talks of this kind we may take our own time?

english_query: And what do you think of the people who teach for money, who are the only ones who teach? Do they seem to you to be teachers of being good?
ugf_response: I often wonder, old teacher, that the well known teacher of speaking is never heard promising to teach being good: and when he hears others promising he only laughs at them; but he thinks that men should be taught to speak.

english_query: It looks like being true is not just in the mind, but in things. The old church teacher says it is wrong to say only seen things are true, because then hidden rocks would not be real rocks. He also says it is wrong to say only things a person can know are true, because then nothing would be true if no one knew it. So he says being true is just being. So being true is in things, not in the mind.
ugf_response: The old church teacher is talking about how things are real in themselves, and leaves out how our minds see them; because what is not part of what a thing really is should not be in the way we say what it is.

english_query: It seems that the mind gets what is not cut up before what is cut up. For the old teacher says that we know from the first parts and small bits. But first parts are not cut up, and small bits are of things that are cut up. So we know what is not cut up before what is cut up.
ugf_response: When we get to know things, the first parts and small bits are not always known first: for sometimes we go from things we see to know the first parts and the causes we can think about. But when our knowing is full, knowing the things that come from causes always needs knowing the first parts and small bits: for as the old teacher says, we think we know when we can show how the first parts come from their causes.
